title: aerangis macrocentra
intro: Aerangis macrocentra, also known as the 'Yellow Form' of the Aerangis species, is a type of orchid plant native to tropical regions of Africa. The Aerangis macrocentra plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aerangis macrocentra include the potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions or infusions, although its availability and use may vary due to conservation status and regulations.
